58.reason: [This loop starts at operator position j, so first character processed is the operator itself, not a digit. Also, it doesn't skip spaces, and assumes next token is contiguous digits, which fails with spaces.]

65.reason: [Accesses s[i+1] which may be out-of-bounds when i == strlen(s)-1. Also, isdigit('\0') is false, so it breaks after first digit if no following digit, but logic is flawed for multi-digit numbers after operator.]
